ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X-coordinate of the cell in 3D space */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the cell in 3D space */,
  "z_coord" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the cell in 3D space */,
  "ch1" REAL /* Sensor reading for channel 1 */,
  "ch2" REAL /* Sensor reading for channel 2 */,
  "ch3" REAL /* Sensor reading for channel 3 */,
  "ch4" REAL /* Sensor reading for channel 4 */,
  "ch2_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 2 */,
  "ch3_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 3 */,
  "ch4_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 4 */,
  "outside" INTEGER /* Indicator if the measurement is outside the target area */,
  "nbrs_old" INTEGER /* Number of old neighbors */,
  "nbrs_new" INTEGER /* Number of new neighbors */,
  "nbrs_that_are_outside" INTEGER /* Number of neighbors outside the target area */,
  "median_dist_to_nbrs" REAL /* Median distance to neighbors */,
  "nbr_id_list" TEXT /* List of neighboring cell IDs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated measurement cell */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., air quality, temperature) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cell */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated measurement cell */,
  "ch2_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 2 */,
  "ch3_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 3 */,
  "ch4_adj" REAL /* Adjusted value for channel 4 */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood record */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main cell */,
  "nbr_cell_ids" TEXT /* List of neighboring cell IDs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_logs" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration took place */,
  "calibrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity that performed the calibration */,
  "calibrator_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the calibrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calibration log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the calibration log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., air quality, temperature) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high value, low value) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message providing details about the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "sensor_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement cell */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was taken */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cells ("cell_id")
)
